name: skforecast
summary: Skforecast is a Python library for time series forecasting using statistical and machine learning models. It works with any estimator compatible with the scikit-learn API, including popular options like LightGBM, XGBoost, CatBoost, Keras, and many others.
maintainer_email: Joaquin Amat Rodrigo <j.amatrodrigo@gmail.com>, Javier Escobar Ortiz <javier.escobar.ortiz@gmail.com>
author_email: Joaquin Amat Rodrigo <j.amatrodrigo@gmail.com>, Javier Escobar Ortiz <javier.escobar.ortiz@gmail.com>
